nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Sad flycatcher
nodes.summary: Sad flycatcher（Sad flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus barbirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于常綠森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It primarily inhabits lowland and montane evergreen forest and woodlands, to a lesser extent drier lowland areas and open high-elevation forest, and seldom mangroves

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered "widespread and common". "In Jamaica, 75% of original forest cover [as been] already eliminated, and remaining forest [is] largely second growth." It is found in two national parks "but hunting and habitat destruction continue because of lack of funds for protection and management"

links.label: 受威胁于

"In Jamaica, 75% of original forest cover [as been] already eliminated, and remaining forest [is] largely second growth."
